Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly surfaces what DFC has and what's missing for a given vehicle without requiring anyone to manually search the catalog line by line.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Takes the raw Dream inventory data and formats it into a clean, organized Excel-ready structure with stocked items, gaps clearly labeled, and any relevant notes added.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates the manual work of formatting a catalog export, delivering a polished, client-ready document structure in seconds.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an email attachment with a summary of what was found for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, replacing what previously required manual catalog searches and spreadsheet building.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, retrieving on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a process where a dozen people independently look up the same part statuses, consolidating all lookups into a single automated pull that takes seconds.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each backorder line with the live Dream inventory data and flags any parts that have no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source — marking them as dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instantly actionable report that shows not just what's backordered but what can actually be fulfilled and what needs escalation — all in one view.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-written based on each part's status — whether it's delayed, in transit, or has no source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the time each team member spends writing individual customer update emails, ensuring faster, consistent communication that keeps customers informed without manual effort.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles in minutes what would take days of manual catalog browsing, capturing the full competitive fitment landscape across three major suppliers in one automated pass.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which two-piece rotor applications DFC already covers and which are gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has product coverage and where there are untapped market opportunities, giving Dino a clear picture of the competitive gap without manual comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers asking about demand for two-piece rotor fitments where DFC currently has no product.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from the market without requiring manual outreach, enabling prioritization of new product development based on actual customer interest.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, cross-reference results, coverage gaps, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a clean, consolidated output that Dino can use directly for product planning decisions, replacing a fragmented process of manually gathering data from multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every live campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of active ad copy in one automated pull, ensuring no ad is missed during a compliance or messaging investigation.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of pulled ad copy for the specified target phrases and returns a precise flagged list identifying the exact ad, field, and matching text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Replaces a manual search across potentially hundreds of ads with an instant, exhaustive scan — eliminating the risk of missing a flagged phrase buried in a large ad account.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the specific field and exact copy where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a clear, actionable findings report directly to the requester's inbox so that compliance or messaging issues can be addressed immediately without any additional digging.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape this week, with 55 total agents across the board — 27 completed, 11 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady from last week. The team continues to make solid progress working through the 11 active builds, with a healthy backlog of 17 planned agents ready to move forward. Great work to everyone keeping this momentum going — the growing list of completed agents is a real testament to the team's execution!
